item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly brakes the repeated pattern of adding a human checkpoint for each local error and reframes the issue as upstream data/rule validation with exception-only manual review. Turn 2 keeps the brake active under deadline pressure while allowing a bounded emergency concession. It explicitly includes all three required elements: one-time coverage for today/this batch, no baseline lift/no permanent workflow node, and a structural repair deadline after the meeting."}
